commands.test_full: cargo test --workspace (requires network for goose git dep + dbus for keyring)
commands.notes: Full workspace build requires: libxcb1-dev, libdbus-1-dev, pkg-config, network access for goose git dep. Only opengoose-types, opengoose-profiles, opengoose-persistence can be tested in sandboxed env.

testing_notes.note: PR #47 merged by maintainer added many persistence tests (was 59, now 75). PR #52 merged. Coverage is comprehensive in all offline-testable crates. Offline test landscape is nearing saturation - remaining gaps all blocked by network/dbus deps.

completed_work.description: Added 2 tests: StreamStarted/Updated/Completed Display variants (1 test) + empty GOOSE_RECIPE_PATH guard (1 test)
completed_work.pr_note: PR submitted this run, number TBD

completed_work.description: Added 4 tests: YamlFileStore::list() extension filtering (3 tests) + WorkItemStore::set_input() (1 test)

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-core SessionManager - needs DB and EventBus, complex cache-DB consistency logic, no tests. Blocked by goose network dep.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-teams chain/router/fan_out executors - complex orchestration logic, existing tests only cover basics. PR #62 extracted ExecutorContext.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-secrets keyring_backend MockStore patterns could be extended
